sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = subtractHours(event_time, 5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, subtractHours(event_time, 3) AS modified_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, subtractHours(toDate('2024-01-02'), 24) AS previous_day FROM test_dates;
